rationale: The page contains detailed technical information about various military aircraft (Apache AH-64E, LCA Mark-1A, Rafale Marine), naval ships (INS Arnala, INS Nistar), and the Rudrastra UAV. This content is highly suitable for generating factual and comparative questions about defense technology.
cleanedText:
6th-Gen Aircraft Programme
- Sixth-generation fighter jets are characterized by attributes such as AI integration, Hypersonic capabilities, Unmanned capabilities, etc.
- China flew two sixth-generation fighter prototypes, the J-36 and J-50.
6.7.2. OTHER AIRCRAFT/HELICOPTER IN NEWS
| Helicopter/Fighter jet | Key Detail/Features |
| :--- | :--- |
| Apache AH-64E | - Multi-role attack helicopter. - A fully integrated weapon system equipped with Hellfire missiles, rockets, and chain gun. - Has advanced sensors, radar, and night vision capabilities. |
| LCA Mark-1A | - Advanced version of the LCA Tejas. - LCA Tejas is a 4.5 generation, all weather and multi-role fighter aircraft. - Equipped with AESA Radar, EW suite consisting of radar warning and self-protection jamming, Digital Map Generator (DMG), etc. |
| Rafale Marine (M) | - Manufacturer: Dassault Aviation, a French aerospace company. - Omnirole capabilities: This means able to carry out all combat aviation missions such as air defense, strikes, reconnaissance, nuclear deterrence, etc. - Generation: 4.5 generation with maximum speed 1.8 Mach. - Other key features: Low-observability to radar, ability to super-cruise and extreme maneuverability at all speeds. - These fighter jets will be for the Indian Navy and will be deployed on the country's first indigenous aircraft carrier INS Vikrant. |
6.8. SHIPS
| Ship | Key Detail/Features |
| :--- | :--- |
| INS Arnala | - Named after the historic coastal fort off Maharashtra. - India's first Anti-Submarine Warfare Shallow Water Craft (ASW-SWC). - Largest Indian Naval warship to be propelled by a Diesel Engine-Waterjet combination. |
| INS Nistar | - First indigenously designed and constructed Diving Support Vessel. - Installed with state-of-the-art Diving Equipment with capability to undertake Deep Sea Saturation Diving up to 300 m depth. - Will serve as 'Mother Ship' for the Deep Submergence Rescue Vessel (DSRV), to rescue and evacuate personnel. |
6.9. OTHER IMPORTANT NEWS
6.9.1. RUDRASTRA
Successful Trial of the Hybrid Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) Rudrastra Conducted at Pokhran, Rajasthan.
About Rudrastra
- A Hybrid Vertical Take-Off and Landing (VTOL) UAV manufactured by Solar Defence and Aerospace Limited (SDAL).
